reviews.title: Waste of money
reviews.text: Don’t waste your money

reviews.title: I like this one better than my other smart watch
reviews.text: I have a big deal designer's name brand smart watch which has a battery life of like 12 hours max and that's with disabling just about everything!  The problem with charging that (and this) smart watch is the fact that you can't just plug them in anywhere with a regular micro usb.  They have their proprietary charging "cradle" that gloms onto the back of the watch.  This one seem so far to have a higher battery life without having to shut down every app to extend the battery life.  The only thing I would wish is that if they market these to both men and women, MAKE THE WATCH FACE A BIT SMALLER!!!  I understand about seeing/reading everything on the watch, but JEEZ it is HUGE!!!  I had to fasten it further down on my wrist/arm so the watch face fit my arm.  I'm not a tiny woman nor am I a big one, so if that's a problem for an average woman, please take note and scale it back by about 3%.  Otherwise, this is a great smart watch.  Runs on Google OS which my other watch runs on and seems to do pretty much the same things.

reviews.title: My husband LOVES this watch!
reviews.text:
I got this watch for my husband who is 6'3. This watch fits his wrist really well. He has used this for over a month before the review.

CONS (very minor):
1. If you move your hand the right way it can hit the buttons on the side and start apps by accident
2. It can be sensitive when moving your hand around and turn on the clock display/run down the battery faster
3. I don't like that the charger is so specific. It would be nice to be able to have more than 1 option to charge

PROS:
1. Battery Life: Easily lasts 1.5 days before charging and it was fine. If it runs down really low it will automatically go into battery saving mode and only functions as a normal watch. It charges very quickly
2. Style: It looks nice. The face size is a good size and easy to read. The band is silicone, comfortable and holds up well to a lot of use. My husband has received many compliments on it. You can change the clock face to a few different options and customize it to you.
3. Alerts: When you get notifications of a message or call the watch vibrates. The watch has a microphone but no speakers so you cannot have a phone call through it or play music. You can type a message or even do a voice to text using the watch.
4. Calendar: The calendar function is nice and gives notifications for upcoming events. It makes it nice when he is in a meeting especially
5. Exercise: It took a while to figure out, but the exercise tracking is nice. My husband doesn't run but does like to lift weights and do other exercise. He was even able to calibrate the watch and it will count his reps for him. It also tracks heart rate, which you can set to track throughout the day. It also tracks steps.
6. GPS: The watch has a GPS and map function. You can see where you are and toggle the maps around to see routes around you. You can also set up multiple route paths ahead if you run/bike etc.
7. Durability: My husband swam with it in a saltwater pool and had no issues, it is definitely water safe. He has hit it accidentally on a few corners/desks and the glass has held up really well, no scratches. The touch sensitivity is great, easy to control but not OVERLY sensitive.

Overall it is a great watch!

reviews.title: Luxury, time and tracking for the seasoned athlete or outdoorsman!
reviews.text:
First things first: you have to be a true athlete or outdoorsman to really want to spend this kind of money on a smartwatch when there are others, but the features on this one make it exceptional. My son has truly been able to maintain his sanity after having to leave school and fly solo during this crisis. He has thrown himself into a variety of workouts to keep himself busy since he can't socialize and thinks this watch is one of the best items he owns.

The GPS features allow him to explore routes, trails, and areas he wasn't previously acquainted with (offline too!) and the health data points are accurate. There are dozens of sports modes for whatever activity he chooses for the day and the display itself is beautiful, bright and very responsive.

I wouldn't pay this much for a watch because I prefer a sedentary lifestyle (LOL) but for the athlete in your family with a long and hot summer ahead, this is the perfect graduation gift too!

reviews.title: Great watch
reviews.text:
Absolutely amazing watch. I have and iPhone and works flawlessly. Only inconvenience is the battery, it barely make it thru the day even don't using gps or other sporty functions. It would be perfect if only
Suunto fix that, otherwise is better than the Ultra for me.

reviews.title: Pretty much a Fenix 6S with a better battery
reviews.text:
I figured I'd give my 6S to the wife and try the 7S Sapphire Solar. In general the watches are nearly identical, but the 7S does have a noticably better battery. When we go hiking, we get identical information, the 7S doesn't need L5 GPS but it works fine. I like the addition of the touch display. Lastly, Garmin is finally getting their act together on software, the 6S and 7S both work well with Garmin Golf and Connect, lots of good data and charts.

There are a few more data pages on the watch for me to look at than on the 6S. I suspect the 6S could have them too but Garmin wants you to upgrade.

Bottom line, if you have a 6, wait for the 8, maybe it will have ECG?

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch3 2020 Smartwatch (Bluetooth + Wi-Fi + GPS) International Model (Bronze, 41mm)
description: The only smartwatch with a precise rotating bezel for navigating between apps. Larger screen, but lighter and thinner for more comfort: With its subtle rotating bezel, it's easier to see and focus on what's important on an even larger screen. The Galaxy Watch3 is thinner and smaller, and up to 15% lighter with a sophisticated look that, thanks to its reduced frame, is perfect for the wrist. Breathe easier with built-in oxygen measurement: The Galaxy Watch3 uses red LEDs and infrared rays to calculate your SpO2 levels or the amount of oxygen in your blood. Because oxygen saturation is directly related to physical activity, you can use the Galaxy Watch3 to push your routine to the next level. Enjoy a better sleep: The Galaxy Watch3 records your active sleep, deep sleep, and total sleep time to keep track and improve the quality of your sleep. Samsung partnered with the National Sleep Foundation to include educational content and provide tips on your device to help you sleep better. Do your best and then repeat it: With over 120 home workout programs to choose from, the Galaxy Watch3 helps you move your body at your own pace. Pick one from your phone and stream it on your TV. It will show you your heart rate in real-time while you exercise. Use the Ridge Sport strap for even more accurate stats. Continue your conversations: When you receive a new message, the Galaxy Watch3 shows your conversation history so you can follow them. You can also view images without needing an extra touch, making it easier to keep up while you're working out. Add some context with the smart answer: Respond to messages at all times and without missing a beat. The Galaxy Watch3's smart reply analyzes the texts and photos you receive and gives you possible answers in different categories, such as food, celebrations, selfies and much more.

reviews.title: works to add security to fitbit watch band
reviews.text:
Good. I have been using these bands as extra security on my fitbit bands since I first got a fitbit dating back to 2015. I have had several styles since then, and I always make sure to have a pack of these security bands on hand. First it was because the fitbit band was just a pressure close band that easily popped off, then it was a matter of keeping a regular watch band style extra secure. These work on the regular width bands.

When I was ready to buy more of these security bands, I was about to buy some that are made for fitbit, but then I realized that those have a protrusion for locking into the band. I really just wanted something to slip on with no need to make use of the band holes to secure it. These are exactly what I wanted. Nice variety of colors.

reviews.title: Really neat little smartwatch.
reviews.text: If you’re looking for a smartwatch that won’t break the bank but still provide handy applications at your literal fingertips, then this is a great buy! Works with iPhone or Android and it’s super easy to set up. The battery life so far is pretty good but I also haven’t had it for too long so will update if anything goes haywire. So far it’s exactly as described by the seller and it arrived quickly and packaged nicely. Great for self-use or a gift.

reviews.title: Not a Good Choice for Me
reviews.text:
Like - was able to call and receive texts. Was able to answer a call on the watch. Pairing was easy. The app was easy.
Dislike - Once paired, the watch takes all your media volume away from your phone. You won't hear any music like from YouTube, text message alert or phone ringing. The watch has a little vibration that you can barely feel, when you receive a text or getting a phone call. All sounds like from Facebook videos or anything, goes through the watch. The only way I could find to get it to quit doing this, was to unpair the watch totally. I need military time but couldn't find a way to make the time in a 24 hour format. You have to put the watch together. The bands come apart from the watch. Everytime you move your hand the watch face lights up. This was definitely not what I was looking for at all. Would I buy this again? No.

reviews.title: Nice looking but---
reviews.text:
Just received yesterday so can't comment on accuracy yet. Got watch set up through app with no problems. Then the maddening part-One of reasons I ordered this watch was watch face on Amazon pictures. Well, I scrolled down through all the faces on the app 4 times and the shown watch face was not even there for download-What the hell!!!!! I've ordered 6 or 7 smart watches and this is the first one without magnetic charging cable. Has this plastic thingy at end of cord you have to push watch down into in order to charge. Don't like this at all. Haven't decided whether to keep or not but not off to a good start.
After a few days another problem. Battery charge on watch shows 100% all the time even after 2 days of wearing. Impossible for battery level not to go down somewhat if not a lot. Returning.

reviews.title: Cheap watch with premium features!
reviews.text:
I own several smart watches only because I like different styles. I have to say this one is very stylish and elegant. Works very well and has tons of features. The watch band feels strong and durable.

Some of the reading features such as the blood pressure monitor is not 100 percent accurate but pretty close compared to a cuff system.

Battery last a few days before needing a charge again. It’s also IP68, has music control once paired to your phone, heart rate monitor, blood oxygen readings, call & text notifications, and so much more!

If you are looking for a smart watch that would not break the bank, then this is it! Go and get yourself one of these today! It’s highly recommended!

title: Michael Kors Access Gen 4 MKGO Smartwatch- Lightweight Touchscreen Powered with Wear OS by Google with Heart Rate, GPS, NFC, and Smartphone Notifications
features: Smartwatches powered with Wear OS by Google work with iPhone and Android Phones

Heart Rate & Activity Tracking using Google Fit; Built in GPS for distance tracking; Swimproof design 3ATM; Google Assistant built in it’s your own personal Google, always ready to help; Speed through checkout with your watch using Google Pay

This is one smart watch receive smartphone notifications and app alerts, manage your calendar, control your music, download third party apps (your favorite ride sharing or music apps), and customize your watch face; touchscreen functionality, built in fitness tracker, microphone, music storage & controls, custom goal & alarm settings, calendar alerts, multiple time zones, weather, LED flashlight, wireless syncing
Estimated 24 hour battery life, based on usage plus 2 additional days in low power mode; magnetic USB rapid charger included; charge up to 80 percent in under an hour
AMOLED display: active-matrix organic light-emitting diode. Water resistant up to 50m: Wearable while swimming in shallow water

reviews.title: It could have been so much better.
reviews.text: I have so many feelings about this watch. First off, set up was a breeze. You just open your app store and get the Google app directed. Pairing and synching up your info is very easy. The watch is very beautiful! I was scared the crystals would rub right off like glitter, but I have not had any issues so far. Now for all the bad stuff.. first and foremost the battery life is terrible. I would give it 9-10 hours max. I'm not much of an app person either, so if you are then that means your battery life will be even lower. It has its own charger, so that means you'll have to carry it around with you, especially big your planning to go out after work or school which is very inconvenient. I with it was a standard C USB charger so I can just use my phone charger, but sadly that's not the case. I did an experiment to see how long the battery would last. I charged it to 100%, and left it in my desk right before bed. In the morning at 8 am, I am at 15%. Whoa. Yeah, the battery is just really really terrible. So I thought I'd just change the battery settings..well there is only one other option and that is to go into battery saving mode where all it will display is the time. That in my opinion defeats the purpose of a smart watch. Other than that, I love how I can customize watch faces by using my social media, or pick from a pre made list by Michael Kors. You can also get email notifications, download apps like Google keep to take notes by speaking into your watch, as well as use Google pay, activity tracker, weather, and pause and play music without taking out your phone. So yeah, if your okay with a short battery life, then everything else about this watch is awesome. Just giving you the real tea. Hope you found this review helpful.

reviews.title: Great feminine watch for dress up or down
reviews.text: This watch works with android and iPhone which makes this a winner in my book. It does pretty much everything my iwatch series 4 does and it looks beautiful on my wrist. Charger is magnetic and easy to use.

reviews.title: Easy set up - does what a smartphone can do
reviews.text:
My wife really likes this watch. This is the one with the glittery watchband... It comes with a magnetic charger that just attaches to the back - no fidgeting. And I was surprised at how quickly it charged.

The screen colors are great! Vibrant colors and clear graphics. The touchscreen itself can lag just a little, but overall responds very well. Neither one of us have ever had a smartwatch before and I was a little apprehensive about setting it up, but I downloaded the wear OS app to her phone and from there, it just walked us through the process. It paired on the first try and seems to be working just as it should.

She's now got it set up to check emails and can generally do anything on the internet that she would do with her phone. Then theres the added advantage of the fitness stuff... heart rate monitor, etc.

All in all, she loves it!

reviews.title: Still Searching
reviews.text:
The MKGO has the best battery life of any WearOS watches I've tried. On a fairly busy day with the app running in the background on my iPhone the whole time, I was able to wear the watch from 6 a.m. until I went to bed around 10. The other three android watches I've tried didn't make it to dinner.

But this doesn't have a speaker.

Why doesn't this have a speaker?

One of the indispensable features of my Apple watch is being able to answer a call quickly when I have stepped out of the room my phone is in. I have lupus. I can't run. People somehow seem to know to call about something important when I've gone to the bathroom or stepped out to the mailbox. I'm close enough to be connected to my phone, but not close enough to answer it.

This never happens with spam calls. Just the ones from the people I won't be able to get back to through their nightmare phone menus.

The lack of this feature makes the watch unsuitable for me, and that makes me sad, because the iPhone is a begware spamming disappointment machine these days, and I really want to move to android.

reviews.title: Nice watch
reviews.text: Shipping was very slow but the watch is nice.  Took minutes to install.  easier than my apple watch.  does everything i need that my series 4 does but is discrete and fashionable.  Love the pink color..... my favorite.  Touchscreen works fine and easy to navigate.  A great buy for those who dont necessarily want an apple watch.  I am able to sync my contacts and apps to the watch.  Tracks my heart-rate on command.  I love this watch.

reviews.title: I wanted to love it
reviews.text: It really isn't the watches fault that I returned it.  It did all it said it would do, the Alexa feature worked, the heart rate monitor worked , the picture was bright, among other things. I didn't like that if you use the timer ( which I use frequently at my job) you can't go back to the main screen, if you do it turns off the timer, but you can use Alexa as a timer and don't have to stay on the same screen so there is a work around. I was also dissapointed with the fact there were only 4 face choices.  But, the reason I returned it is that my phone is older and it wears down my battery quickly and was causing cpu (?) overload warnings.

reviews.title: Solid watch
reviews.text:
Watch came well packaged and was easy to set up and pair using the provided instructions on the item page. It was made well and kept good time. I have a Motorola phone and it would not stay paired with my phone. The sleep feature never seemed to work because it was constantly disconnecting from the app. It may be a good choice for someone else, but I returned it.

The battery life was excellent and it was a well constructed and comfortable watch

title: Cubitt CT2S Series 3 Smart Watch 1.69" Touch Screen, Fitness Tracker, with Heart Rate, Blood Oxygen, Stress and Sleep Monitor, IP68 Waterproof, Step Counter, Pedometer Smartwatch for Women Men
features: PREMIUM DISPLAY: Large 1.69-inch TFT-LCD color HD touch screen featuring customized displays, wake up function to easily see time, date, steps, calories and distance. You can personalize the dial with many of our style options, and can even upload a personal picture to be on your smart watch background

SMART FUNCTIONS: Receive Call, Text, Whatsapp and Social Media notifications. Incoming calls can be alerted via vibration reminders, with the option to hang up. Display up to 128 characters on your tracker screen. Sedentary alerts can be turned On, to be alerted with vibration reminders after a specific time of no movement. Alarm clock + timer, and calendar alerts are also shown on the screen as notifications. Option to sync data with Strava

ALL DAY FITNESS TRACKING: Track your daily activities with a built-in accelerometer sensor that allows you to track distance traveled, record steps, get calories burned, and review active minutes, including pace. Your workout progress can be simply viewed directly from our app, by choosing between 14 different sports modes including Outdoor / Outdoor Running and Walking, Outdoor cycling, Spinning bike, Cricket, Hiking, Swimming, Yoga,Rowing machine, Elliptical trainer, Fitness, and others

HEART RATE, BLOOD OXYGEN, SLEEP AND STRESS MONITOR: Automatically monitors your daily heart rate, blood oxygen and stress. You can read directly on the watch all day, which helps you understand your health and make reasonable adjustments on your life style. Also monitors your sleep which gives you a comprenhensive analysis of your sleep. Our app allows you to review graphs that analyze how deep or light is your sleep and your wake-up times.

APP PAIRING AND BATTERY: pairing is simple, by using Bluetooth 4.2, automatically sync your device to a phone using iOS 8. 0/Android OS 4. 4 or above. Built with a 300mAh battery that takes less than 2 hours to charge and can be used for up to 10 days with a standby time of 30-45 days. You can adjust the screen brightness according to your needs

reviews.title: Great watch for a great price
reviews.text: I was skeptical about the watch as I had purchased other watches only to have them fail miserably. This watch turned out great. The most important thing to do is read the manual. Especially about how to wear the watch, which is a little higher than a normal watch. This will make the accuracy much better. The step counter is controlled by arm movement not actual steps, so if you walk stiff armed , it will be inaccurate. Move your arms when walking , the watch will be much more accurate.Make sure you go into the app on your phone and activate the exercises your interested in. This will help the watch to track it better. Also activate the media part of the app for sms,email etc. You can also monitor who is calling you, so you can choose to answer you phone or not. I am extremely pleased with my purchase and will be watching for other products from this company.

reviews.title: Loved it..: til it burned me!
reviews.text: I loved it until I woke up with a burn!!

reviews.title: As advertised
reviews.text: Great watch! Exactly what I wanted (a watch to count steps and that is easy to read). The set up was fairly easy - I received the watch in the early evening and had it set up within half an hour ( I am in my seventies). This is my 3rd watch - first was very expensive and too invasive - second watch cost twice as much as this one and quit charging in the second week - third times a charm.

reviews.title: Hard to set up.
reviews.text: Very difficult to program. I will be sending it back.

reviews.title: There were very little instructions on how to use/set up the watch.  Had to go online to search.
reviews.text: Face of watch is good, and seems like good quality.  Plus I like that it is a touch screen/can swipe.

title: UHKZ 4 Pack Elastic Nylon Bands Compatible with Fitbit Versa 3/Fitbit Sense,Stretchy Fabric Sport Band for Fitbit Versa Smart Watch for Women Men,Black/Rose Pink/White/Smokey Mauve
features: ❤【Compatibility】 This Adjustable Nylon Bands Only Compatible with Fitbit Versa 3/Fitbit Sense.

❤【Premium Nylon Material】The watch band is made of premium stretch nylon: It is soft, durable, lightweight, washable and comfortable to wear. Stretch bracelet wrist bands and fits snugly without constriction. Close to your wrist, it won't irritate your skin, perfect for all day-workouts and regular wear.

❤【Flexible Design】Elastic band and adjustable stainless steel buckle design. The stretchy nylon materials make the strap easy to put on and off. Stylish loop buckle make it could be length adjustable as you wish. The band suitable for wrist size 4.5"-9.5".
❤【Easy to Install】The sport band With quick release spring bars, which locks onto the watch Interface precisely and securely, no tool needed.
❤【Unique Design】Multiple colors and sizes for your choice. You can find lovely color for different occasion. The nylon bands have unique wave pattern, more fashion and catch sights.

reviews.title: Comfortable, worth the value
reviews.text: The band that originally came with the Fitbit was so uncomfortable. It dig into my wrist and left marks. I ordered another band that was about the same price as all four of these. It was useless. Barely fit, and it wouldn’t keep its position, so I decided to try these. First, I couldn’t believe that the same price got me FOUR bands in different colors! The bands are easily adjustable. Once fitted, these stay in place on the wrist. They’re comfy, and they stretch enough so that I can pull off the Fitbit to charge without having to readjust the band. Though inexpensive, this particular purchase was one of the best I’ve had this year, LOL.

reviews.title: Really love them but 2 already broke after 2 weeks
reviews.text: I really love these, I hate the bands that come with the fitbits. These are really comfortable but 1 band wouldn't work for some reason then another band broke after 2 weeks without even consistently wearing it.

reviews.title: Did NOT Work with Sense 2
reviews.text: Not sure what the issue is, but I could not get any of these bands to engage and lock with the Sense 2.  The tab fits into the slot just fine, but it won't engage the locking tab to hold the band into place.  Pulling on the band at all causes it to simply fall out of the watch case.  The bands themselves look fine, but not locking into place obviously makes them worthless for their intended purpose.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: These performed ok.  It's a good elastic band

reviews.title: Very comfortable
reviews.text: Fits well and allows my arm to breath. I got a rash from the plastic ones

title: Kids Smart Watch, Toddler Watch for 3-12 Ages Year Old, Premium Kids Smartwatches with 16 Learning Games Video Camera Pedometer Music Alarm Flashlight, Birthday Gift for Kids Boys Girls(Pink)
features: 🎁[ Multi-functional Smart Watch for Kids ]👈 - The kid smart watch are specially designed gifts for children aged 3-12. The kids watch comes with everything you need in a smartwatch. 16 Games , taking pictures , videos , music players , step counter , alarm , calculator , calendar , 12/24 h , torch , even switch the watch interface. It can bring convenience and fun to children's lives. Perfect gift for your children. I think your kiddos will absolutely love them!!

🧐[ Watch for Kids with 16 Learning Games]👍 - Fun for kids. The kids smart watch has 16 funny games. These games are all intellectual games, which can help children develop their creative ways of thinking, so that children can grow up in the process of playing games. The 1.54in HD large-screen display protects your kid's eyes from harm.

📻[ Kids Smart Watch with Camera ]🌅 -The kids smartwatch supports taking pictures and video recording. It allows children to take pictures of scenery or daily selfies when traveling, helping them to recall the good times in life. Your child can watch the video and picture through the touch screen, and the high-resolution screen can provide better user experience.

🏃[ Pedometer & Music Player ]🏃‍♀ - Aautomatically record your child's daily steps and calories burned to help you clearly understand your child's exercise. And inspire children's interest in sports and make their bodies healthier. HiFi music allows children to enjoy the joy of music at any time.

⌚[Time Management] ⏰- The main screen of the kids watch will display the date, week and time. In addition, it also supports 12/24 hours, stopwatch, timing. Owning this smart watch can enhance the child's time concept and cultivate his ability to master time. The metal dial design will make the watch more cool and refined.

title: Maledan Bands Compatible with Fitbit Charge 3 and Charge 4, Breathable Sport Band Replacement Wristbands with Air Holes for Charge 4/ Charge 3/ Charge 3 SE Fitness Tracker Women Men, 3-Pack
features: 【PREMIUM WATERPROOF MATERIAL】 Maledan for Charge 3 bands/Charge 4 bands are made of high quality elastomer in ventilation holes design, swim-ready & easy to dry, prevent skin from irritation; soft, lightweight, more breathable & comfortable to wear

【DOUBLE BUCKLE & FASTENER NOTCH】Especially polished aluminum double buckle design, strong and touch smooth, easy to assemble and resize, holds your Charge 3 replacement bands securely in place and a strap holder with a notch to secure the extra length

【Effortless Installation & Removal】Maledan for Charge 3/Charge 4 sport band comes with upgraded convenient & durable adapters, locks onto your Charge 3/4 precisely and securely, NO worry about falling off; Easy and direct installation and one button removal

【ADJUSTABLE SIZES】Small size for 5.5"-7.1" wrist; Large size for 7.1" - 8.7 wrist. More Air Holes Design on the strap, easy to find the most suitable size for your wrist and adjust the length of the band. Perfectly fit for both men’s and women’s wrist

【MULTI COLORS】Various decent colors for your choice and these charge 4 bands & charge 3 bands can be also mixed wearing for your own unique style, personalize your Charge 4/3 and Charge 3 Specail Edition to fit your mood and outfit in daily life

reviews.title: fitbit 3 perforated bands
reviews.text: I purchased these after market bands because the 'large' I got with my fitbit 3 was WAY too big.  It's amazing how much better 1" less in the band fits.  It comes with three colors.  The only thing I am not really super happy about is the silver tone buckle - I am nervous about nickle content as it is an allergy thing for me. The original is black and matches the band. You get 3 full bands, One black... one gray.. and one light aqua blue - it's more of a very light gray blue.  They are a rubbery ? silicone like? material. Smooth, no sharp edges.  They attached easily. So far, so good.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Kiddo Loves the colors
reviews.text: Purchased as a gift and he loves the colors.  As described.  Easy to clean

reviews.title: Attaches as Manufactured by Fitbit
reviews.text: Exactly as described.  Fits and attaches to the Fitbit watch as manufactured by Fitbit.

reviews.title: Good buy
reviews.text: All 3 bands fit well and are comfortable to wear.

reviews.title: Wore these OUT
reviews.text: Worked well stayed latched very well, unless high stress than breaks free, breathable, and colors are great!
